title: Poached Russian Gooey Currant Stir-fry
description: A salty, gooey post-workout dish featuring gluten-free-friendly currants poached in a savory sauce and served with a light gluten-free base.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together flour and water until smooth.
Heat butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add garlic and currants; cook for about 2 minutes.
Pour in the flour mixture slowly while continuously stirring to avoid lumps.
Stir in rice wine vinegar, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil then reduce heat and let simmer until thickened (about 5-7 minutes).
Remove from heat; stir in additional salt and pepper as desired for flavor balance. Serve with gluten-free base or crackers.
If you have any leftover sauce, store it in the fridge for up to 3 days for reheating.
Enjoy your healthy and satisfying post-workout snack!
